dealerId.title: dealerId
dealerId.description:
The Salesforce Account ID of the dealer starting 
with 001. Stored from Instruction 15.
NEVER pass vdaId here. NEVER pass vehicleDefinitionId here.
Must start with 001.

leadId.title: leadId
leadId.description:
The Salesforce Lead ID starting with 00Q. 
Stored from Lookup_Lead_By_Phone or 
Create_Lead_From_Phone_And_Name response.
NEVER pass pincode here. NEVER pass a number here.
Must start with 00Q.

pincode.title: pincode
pincode.description:
The 5 or 6 digit zip code collected from user 
during lead creation or explicitly asked.
Example: 84060 or 400001.
NEVER pass leadId here. This is a zip code only.

slotLabel.title: slotLabel
slotLabel.description: The exact time slot selected by the user e.g. 10:00 AM - 10:30 AM. Must match exactly as returned by Fetch Available Time Slots action.

testDriveDate.title: testDriveDate
testDriveDate.description: The date selected by the user for the test drive in YYYY-MM-DD format.

vdaId.title: vdaId
vdaId.description:
The VehicleDef_Dealer junction record ID.
Stored from Fetch_Dealers_By_Vehicle_And_Pincode 
response as Part 3 of dealerIdMap.
NEVER pass dealerId here. NEVER pass vehicleDefinitionId here.
This is different from dealerId and vehicleDefinitionId.

vehicleDefinitionId.title: vehicleDefinitionId
vehicleDefinitionId.description: The Salesforce ID of the Vehicle Definition selected by the user. Comes from the vehicleList parsed earlier.
